sentences.english: I used to go to school daily.
sentences.hindi: मैं रोज़ स्कूल जाता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i used to go to school daily

sentences.english: I could swim when I was a child.
sentences.hindi: मैं बचपन में तैर सकता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i could swim when i was a child

sentences.english: I should have come earlier.
sentences.hindi: मुझे पहले आना चाहिए था।
sentences.pronunciation: i should have come earlier

sentences.english: He must have worked very hard.
sentences.hindi: उसने जरूर बहुत मेहनत की होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: he must have worked very hard

sentences.english: I could have done this earlier.
sentences.hindi: मैं यह पहले कर सकता था।
sentences.pronunciation: i could have done this earlier

sentences.english: If I had known, I would have come.
sentences.hindi: अगर मुझे पता होता, तो मैं आता।
sentences.pronunciation: if i had known i would have come

sentences.english: He may have gone there.
sentences.hindi: वह शायद वहाँ गया होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: he may have gone there

sentences.english: He might have gone, but I am not sure.
sentences.hindi: वह शायद गया होगा, लेकिन पक्का नहीं।
sentences.pronunciation: he might have gone but i am not sure

sentences.english: I will come tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: मैं कल आऊँगा।
sentences.pronunciation: i will come tomorrow

sentences.english: We ought to respect our parents.
sentences.hindi: हमें अपने माता-पिता की इज्जत करनी चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: we ought to respect our parents

sentences.english: Could you help me?
sentences.hindi: क्या तुम मुझे मदद कर सकते हो?
sentences.pronunciation: could you help me

sentences.english: You should have apologized to him.
sentences.hindi: तुम्हें उससे माफी मांगनी चाहिए थी।
sentences.pronunciation: you should have apologized to him

sentences.english: He dared to say this.
sentences.hindi: उसने ऐसा कहने की हिम्मत की।
sentences.pronunciation: he dared to say this

sentences.english: Shall I close the door?
sentences.hindi: क्या मैं दरवाज़ा बंद कर दूँ?
sentences.pronunciation: shall i close the door

sentences.english: He used to smoke.
sentences.hindi: वह पहले सिगरेट पीता था।
sentences.pronunciation: he used to smoke

sentences.english: She may have read this book.
sentences.hindi: शायद उसने यह किताब पढ़ी होगी।
sentences.pronunciation: she may have read this book

sentences.english: You could have told me.
sentences.hindi: तुम मुझे बता सकते थे।
sentences.pronunciation: you could have told me

sentences.english: We ought to follow the rules.
sentences.hindi: हमें नियमों का पालन करना चाहिए।
sentences.pronunciation: we ought to follow the rules

sentences.english: She might have heard this.
sentences.hindi: शायद उसने यह सुना होगा।
sentences.pronunciation: she might have heard this

sentences.english: We will meet tomorrow.
sentences.hindi: हम कल मिलेंगे।
sentences.pronunciation: we will meet tomorrow
